title: ophrys sphegodes subsp. integra
intro: Ophrys sphegodes subsp. integra, also known as the Bee Orchid or Western Sphegodes, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the genus Ophrys and is native to Europe and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, derived from its roots and flowers. The health benefits of Ophrys sphegodes subsp. integra include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as wound healing and skin issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are typically dried and used in infusions, decoctions, or as a powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
